channel.title: Stargate on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Stargate on MinWeb

item.title: Iran Threatens to Destroy $30B Stargate AI Data Center
item.description: If the world of AI feels like a relentless, dizzying parade of corporate ego and billion-dollar announcements, you aren’t alone. For months, we’ve been hearing about “Stargate”—a massive, futuristic data center rising from the Abu Dhabi desert. It sounds like something pulled straight out of a sci-fi novel, a monument to the god-like computational power of OpenAI, Microsoft, and NVIDIA. Frankly, the sheer scale of the thing is enough to make anyone nervous.
